summary: This document outlines the Go-To-Market strategy for KeepMeCompany's AI phone agents targeting UK GP practices and Integrated Care Boards. It details a five-phase rollout plan from pilot centers to national scale, including market data on patient volumes and estimated cost savings per GP minute. The plan emphasizes proving value to ICBs to secure distribution and payment models.

sniff_test_notes: Located in Finances/VCs folder suggesting investor-facing material, though text reads as internal strategic planning. Contains specific financial assumptions regarding GP minute costs.
